title: 2026-06-06 to 2026-06-13 Shino Ise Weather Lab
summary: Fourteen-image Shino character day sequence using an Ise/Nanki early-June weather model, stronger color variation, and routes through market, tram, library, aquarium, lab, old town, seaside, station, lounge, travel, and home without real logos.
summaryJa: 架空の港町のアルバム。構成はマーケット、移動、ミュージアム、仕事場。
